description: 45F, T2DM on metformin + empagliflozin, A1C 6.8%, no CVD, eGFR 92. At target — only statin for diabetes (R5, moderate-intensity) fires.

actions.label: Initiate moderate-intensity statin therapy
actions.rationale: ADA-A: All adults aged 40-75 with diabetes should receive at least moderate-intensity statin regardless of ASCVD risk score. Patient is 45, diabetic, statin-naive. No additional risk factors suggesting high-intensity escalation.

actions.label: Continue metformin and empagliflozin
actions.rationale: A1C 6.8% is at target (<7%). Current dual therapy is effective. No indication for intensification.

contraindications.label: Add insulin or additional glucose-lowering agent
contraindications.rationale: A1C 6.8% is below the 7% target. Adding insulin would risk hypoglycemia without benefit. No glycemic indication for intensification.
